props.name: variant
props.description: Indicator shape: pulsing `dots` or a rotating `spinner` arc.

props.name: value
props.description: Completion percentage (0–100) for the `bar` variant: the bar becomes determinate (a fill that grows to done) and exposes progressbar semantics. Leave `null` for the indeterminate sliding segment.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible name announced by the status role.

props.name: showLabel
props.description: Also render the `label` as visible text next to the indicator.

props.name: showValue
props.description: Show the percentage (from `value`) as visible text.

props.name: detail
props.description: Extra visible detail, e.g. "3 of 8 files" or "48 MB of 128 MB".

props.name: decorative
props.description: Hide from assistive tech (the surrounding region announces the state).
